description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages test and publish, using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/consensus.enterprises/drumkit/ddev (user ddev:ddev, empty entrypoint) for test jobs and registry.gitlab.com/consensus.enterprises/drumkit/base:latest for the pages job, and a docker:20-dind service with alias docker and the command --tls=false. Define a cache keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME that stores $LOCAL_DIR and $COMPOSER_CACHE_DIR, and set variables DOCKER_DRIVER, DOCKER_HOST, DOCKER_TLS_CERTDIR, FF_DISABLE_UMASK_FOR_DOCKER_EXECUTOR, FF_NETWORK_PER_BUILD, plus project variables COMPOSER_CACHE_DIR, DEBIAN_FRONTEND, GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY, LOCAL_DIR, PYTHONUNBUFFERED. In the test stage add a test:behat job that runs the shared before_script commands (ddev config global --instrumentation-opt-in=true; ddev config global --omit-containers=ddev-ssh-agent; ddev mutagen reset && ddev config global --mutagen-enabled=false; source d; make start; ddev composer config allow-plugins.wikimedia/composer-merge-plugin false; ddev composer install --no-progress; ddev composer config allow-plugins.wikimedia/composer-merge-plugin true; ddev composer install --no-progress; make install workers) then executes make run-behat SUITE=ci, and a test:phpunit job that runs the same before_script then make run-phpunit, both using the ddev image and docker:20-dind service. In the publish stage add a pages job that runs . d, make hugo, hugo version before the script, then builds the site with hugo -s docs, always publishes the public/ directory as an artifact, runs only on the main branch of aegir/aegir, allows failure and runs always.
